programme.title: Super Bowl Classics
programme.sub-title: XLIX: New England Patriots vs. Seattle Seahawks
programme.desc: Tom Brady leads the New England Patriots' comeback and a game-ending interception by Malcolm Butler at the 1-yard line seals the 28-24 victory.

programme.title: Super Bowl Classic Games
programme.sub-title: Super Bowl XLIII: Steelers vs. Cardinals
programme.desc: The Pittsburgh Steelers and Arizona Cardinals dueled in a Super Bowl for the ages that featured plenty of iconic moments.

programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs

programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.desc: The Chiefs cement their dynasty with a game winning overtime walk-off touchdown pass from Patrick Mahomes to Mecole Hardman. Kansas City wins back-to-back Super Bowls by defeating the 49ers 25-22 in Super Bowl LVIII.

programme.title: Super Bowl Classic Games
programme.sub-title: Super Bowl LI: Patriots vs. Falcons
programme.desc: Relive the Super Bow LI matchup between the New England Patriots and the Atlanta Falcons by watching the New England Patriots rally from being down 25 points.

programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.desc: Derek Carr's touchdown pass caps Las Vegas Raiders rally past Baltimore Ravens 33-27 in OT. The party could finally begin for real after the first game with fans in Las Vegas.

programme.title: The Big Break
programme.desc: Contestants are surprised when someone might just be given a second chance to keep their dreams alive.

programme.title: The Big Break
programme.desc: Former teammates turn opponents in an Elimination Challenge that brings new meaning to "up and down."

programme.title: The Big Break
programme.desc: Contestants play golf's version of a favorite schoolyard basketball game and learn why pin-high can be the best shot.

programme.title: The Big Break
programme.desc: The final four competitors square off in match play and one player makes the best of a second opportunity to avoid elimination.

programme.title: The Big Break
programme.desc: Tensions run high as the final three face several head-to-head challenges that narrow the field to two.

programme.title: The Big Break
programme.desc: Contestants face off in the grand finale.

programme.title: Golf Channel Games
programme.desc: GolfPass brings you thousands of lessons from the game's best instructors, original series, news, features and more.

programme.title: Playing Lessons
programme.desc: PGA Tour winner Max Homa joins Bones on the course to share his tips and strategies that have led to his global success.

programme.title: Playing Lessons
programme.desc: Max Homa continues his Playing Lesson with stories from his Tour life and more insights on how to shoot lower scores.

programme.title: Playing Lessons
programme.sub-title: Jake Knapp -- Trouble Shots & Par 5 Management
programme.desc: Jake Knapp analyzes par five shot management, covering tee shot techniques (lower trajectory, subtle fade), green slopes and putting speed.

programme.title: Playing Lessons
programme.desc: Strategies for handling par fours, prioritizing smart decisions over power; evaluate the risk and reward of each shot, and learn specific techniques for tee shots and approaches.

programme.title: Playing Lessons
programme.desc: Discover the strategies and techniques that work for them on the big stage and see what you can bring back to your own home course.

programme.title: Playing Lessons
programme.desc: Discover the strategies and techniques that work for them on the big stage and see what you can bring back to your own home course.

programme.title: Golfer's Guide: Playing in the Wind
programme.sub-title: Playing Downwind and Into the Wind
programme.desc: Nick Dougherty breaks down the art of playing downwind and into the wind. Nick will guide you through techniques to maximize distance, control trajectory, and adjust your club selection to take full advantage of the wind.

programme.title: Golfer's Guide: Playing in the Wind
programme.sub-title: Right to Left Left to Right
programme.desc: Nick Dougherty teaches techniques and tips for achieving excellent golf performance when playing into the wind. He shows how to maximize distance, control trajectory, and adjust club selection to make the most of the weather conditions.

programme.title: Big Break: Where Are They Now?
programme.desc: We catch up with former Big Break competitors Isaac Sanchez and Chad Pfeifer. Sanchez, who goes by the nickname "Sasquatch," is in actuality a gentle giant. But that didn't stop the competitor in him from creating some mythical moments.

programme.title: Big Break: Where Are They Now?
programme.sub-title: Mallory Blackwelder, Julien Trudeau & Robbie Biershenk
programme.desc: They began as members of opposite teams on Big Break Ireland; Mallory Blackwelder and Julien Trudeau ended as the series' first married couple; in between, Mallory was a standout on Big Break NFL for Team Brown; meet the rest of their new team.

programme.title: Big Break: Where Are They Now?
programme.desc: Sara Brown graced Golf Channel screens with strong runs at Big Break Sandals and Big Break Dominican Republic; she is running a family, occasionally herding preschoolers and being the ultimate team mom for her husband’s other successful squad.

programme.title: Big Break: Where Are They Now?
programme.sub-title: Don Donatello & Stefanie Kenoyer; Al Del Greco
programme.desc: Don Donatello earned notoriety for his outbursts and antics, but quickly became heralded as a gritty competitor. Appearances on Big Break IV U.S. vs. Europe and Big Break Reunion solidified Donatello as legendary.

programme.title: Golf Central
programme.desc: Keep up with everything that's happening in the world of golf. The game's only live, daily news source provides more than just scores, delivering in depth analysis, breaking news, and unforgettable highlights.

programme.title: Golf Central
programme.desc: Keep up with everything that's happening in the world of golf. The game's only live, daily news source provides more than just scores, delivering in depth analysis, breaking news, and unforgettable highlights.

programme.title: The Golf Fix
programme.desc: Devan Bonebrake teaches his three major keys for solid pitch shots; drills for improving the angle of attack, keeping a swing on the correct plane and using the body properly like Steve Stricker.

programme.title: The Golf Fix
programme.desc: Devan Bonebrake teaches how to be successful at a variety of bunker shots; learning to stick approach shots from the fairway bunker like Tiger Woods and scramble from greenside bunkers like Graeme McDowell.

programme.title: The Golf Fix
programme.desc: Devan Bonebrake hits the course to reveal how to stop spraying the driver; learning a pre-shot routine used by Jason Day, a go-to shot used by Jack Nicklaus and a power move used by a long drive champion.

programme.title: Golf Central
programme.desc: Keep up with everything that's happening in the world of golf. The game's only live, daily news source provides more than just scores, delivering in depth analysis, breaking news, and unforgettable highlights.

programme.title: Build a Better Game
programme.desc: Debbie Doniger is here to go through the checkpoints of the golf swing -- from the setup to the top of the backswing. She's got individualized tips and drills for each position to help golfers play their best golf and own their swing.

programme.title: Build a Better Game
programme.desc: Debbie Doniger is back to go through the rest of the checkpoints of the swing -- from the transition through impact. Plus, with this newfound knowledge, she'll help put all the checkpoints together to have golfers swinging their best in no time.

programme.title: Golfer's Guide - 2-Minute Drills
programme.desc: John Montgomery is teaching simple but effective drills that can be done pre-round to improve from tee-to-green. Learn how to stop slices and hooks with the driver, improve tempo and rhythm with your irons and more.

programme.title: Golfer's Guide - 2-Minute Drills
programme.desc: John Montgomery is teaching simple but effective drills that can be done pre-round to improve from tee-to-green. Learn how to eliminate the chicken wing for more accuracy with the driver, fix fact contact with your irons.

programme.title: Golf Central
programme.desc: Keep up with everything that's happening in the world of golf. The game's only live, daily news source provides more than just scores, delivering in depth analysis, breaking news, and unforgettable highlights.

programme.title: Lessons With a Champion Golfer
programme.desc: The latest installment in GolfPass' popular "Lessons With a Champion Golfer" series delves into the game of 2007 ANA Inspiration champion Morgan Pressel, who is eager to share her wisdom and advice to help golfers play better.

programme.title: Playing Lessons
programme.desc: Collin Morikawa joins Jim Mackay on the course to show how he thinks his way around the links. From Las Vegas Paiute Golf Resort in Nevada.

programme.title: Playing Lessons
programme.desc: 2011 PGA Championship and multi-time PGA TOUR winner, Keegan Bradley, joins Bones on the course and shares the tips and strategies that have led to his impressive career. Keegan gives unique advice on how he "sees the field" off the tee.

programme.title: Playing Lessons
programme.desc: Tony Finau joins instructor Sean Foley on the course for an "inside the ropes" look at one of golf's longest hitters. Finau shares his insight on how he manages his way around the course from tee to green.

programme.title: Playing Lessons
programme.desc: Tony Finau joins instructor Sean Foley on the course for an "inside the ropes" look at one of golf's longest hitters. Finau shares his insight on how he manages his way around the course from tee to green.

programme.title: Playing Lessons
programme.desc: PGA Tour standout Wyndham Clark goes in depth with his on-course strategies. Wyndham gives insight into how he plays par 5's aggressively and shows unique viewpoints on when it is worth it to lay-up on par 3's.

programme.desc: Martin Hall and Blair O'Neal are back on the range teaching how to get off to a solid start this golf season; ball striking tips used by greats; Hall reveals how two empty sleeves of golf balls can improve ball striking.

programme.title: School of Golf
programme.desc: Martin Hall and Blair O'Neal are back on the range teaching how to get off to a solid start this golf season; ball striking tips used by greats; Hall reveals how two empty sleeves of golf balls can improve ball striking.

programme.title: School of Golf
